name: python-pro
description: Enforce a production Python 3.11+ standard: stdlib-first dependency discipline (and secure, low-level, fast, async third-party picks when stdlib won't do), a live LSP that pushes standard violations into the editor and the agent loop, an 8-linter pipeline, an AST rule validator, security and complexity scanners, conformant scaffolding, a token-frugal code-outline tool, pytest running, skill auto-detection, context-injecting hooks, and task-focused subagents, exposed as an MCP server.
